name: wikiR local vault tools
description: Agent-facing tools for maintaining a local-first Obsidian wikiR vault. Humans should normally use natural-language requests; the agent runtime calls these tools automatically.

tools.name: wiki_init
tools.description: Create or repair the required vault directories.

tools.name: wiki_ingest
tools.description: Scan 00_Inbox/materials and create source cards in 01_Sources without moving or deleting raw files.

dry_run.description: Preview source cards without writing them.

tools.name: wiki_build_index
tools.description: Build the local lexical retrieval index over sources, notes, projects, and outputs.

tools.name: wiki_search
tools.description: Search the local vault index and return ranked source snippets.

tools.name: wiki_context
tools.description: Generate 90_System/context/last_context.md for a writing or analysis task.

tools.name: wiki_doctor
tools.description: Check frontmatter, broken links, and index freshness.
